content.en:
"Go!"

A forbidden treasure similar to a compass-like treasure was sacrificed by the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor and appeared outside the large array, quickly freezing the void in all directions.

In a flash.

A curtain of light covered a vast area around it, directly covering and imprisoning this area, as if it were separated from the surrounding area into two worlds that could not be crossed.

"What is this?"

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor looked at that layer of light curtain, very puzzled.

He tried to attack, but he couldn't shake the light curtain, and under the light curtain, the void in this area was completely imprisoned, their speed became very slow, and they couldn't use the other treasures to shuttle away.

In other words, they are confined to this area.

"Don't waste your efforts!" Shi Ying Dao Ancestor said: "In order to allow me to successfully refine the Forbidden Void Realm, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has given me this Forbidden Treasure of the Void Plate, not to mention you Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, even if it is the top Supreme Dao Ancestor who wants to break the light curtain, it will take a long time." You have wasted such a precious forbidden treasure in our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and when I control the Forbidden Void Realm, you will all die!"

"What!"

The expressions of the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and the others changed greatly, and they didn't believe it, and they attacked the light curtain frantically one by one, but they couldn't shake it.

Ye Tian also tried to attack a few times, but he couldn't break the light curtain, as if it was an indelible prohibition.

"Kill the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace first!"

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor said coldly.

If you kill all the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and then only the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor is left, even if you use the Forbidden Void Realm to suppress them, it will be more difficult to kill them all.

But once the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace still survived a lot, then under the suppression of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, they would have little ability to resist.

Immediately, under the attack of the three invincible Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors, Evil Buddha Dao Ancestors, and Demon Fu Dao Ancestors, one of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was killed one after another, and several Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Demon Sect did not escape, and they were also killed one by one.

However, there were many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and it was more difficult to kill them all.

And as time passed, the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors became more and more nervous, as if the Forbidden Void Realm would not be refined for long.

As a result, the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and they were almost insane.

After all, can they not be in a hurry when their lives are in danger?

Among the Dao Ancestors present, the most calm person was Ye Tian.

Anyway, he is copying his body, even if he really falls, he should not have entered the Forbidden Void Realm, although it will be a pity to lose a large number of forbidden strange objects and forbidden spirit root flowers, but there is nothing he can do.

But if his replica body really fell, he would definitely destroy the Forbidden Spirit Root Flower in advance, and he would not leave it to the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestors.

After another long time, Shi Ying Dao Ancestor's expression became more and more excited, obviously it would not be long before he could refine the Forbidden Void Realm.

"Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, Demon Demon Dao Ancestor, you three dare to kill so many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors in our Heavenly Emperor Palace, you will soon fall and die one by one!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor laughed wildly.

He didn't think that anyone would be able to stop him at this time, because he was 100% able to refine and control the Forbidden Void Realm.

Abrupt.

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor's expression froze, and he found that the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm had disappeared.

No, it's not that it's gone, it's that he can't sense it, and he can't sense it using this great array of refining worlds.

And then—

Woohoo Woo Woo !!

A Sevenfold Dao Ancestor was removed, and the Dao Ancestors from all over the Forbidden Void Realm were also moved out one by one, and no one was an exception.

Even the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors who were under the suppression of the Forbidden Treasure Dingkong Disk were also removed, which showed that no matter how powerful the Forbidden Treasure was, they still couldn't resist the Forbidden Void Realm.

Seeing that the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor was removed, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor roared angrily: "No!"

Soon.

He found that he had also been removed, and the moment he was removed, he was in complete despair.

He knew very well that this was someone who had refined and controlled the Forbidden Void Realm one step ahead of him.

Crucially, he seemed to be the last to be removed.

If this goes out, what if others think that he is refining and controlling the Forbidden Void Realm?

He said that he didn't refine it himself, can others believe it? Can the Heavenly Emperor Palace believe it?

After all, even if he was interrogated from the mouths of the other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he would think that he was in control of the Forbidden Void Realm, after all, there was no second person refining and controlling the Forbidden Void Realm!

--------------

Forbidden Void Boundary.

One by one, the ancestors emerged, and Ye Tian also came out.

In the end, Shiying Dao Ancestor also came out.

At this time, one after another, the big forces protected the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor on their side.

The Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor was the first to speak: "Void Mi Dao Ancestor, Heaven Devouring Dao Ancestor, the Forbidden Void Realm has been refined by the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, we can't stop it!"

"That's it!"

Void Mi Dao Ancestor sighed.

And the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor in the distance said angrily: "I haven't refined the Forbidden Void Realm at all, if I refine the Forbidden Void Realm, do you still want to live?"

The Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor spoke: "Who knows if you want to pretend that you don't have the appearance of refining the Forbidden Void Realm? But at that time, you were the only one refining the Forbidden Void Realm, and you used the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Forbidden Supreme Treasure Dingkong Disk, no one could interrupt your refining, you said that you didn't refine it, then who did it?"

"I don't know who refined the Forbidden Void Realm, but it's definitely not me!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor also wanted to explain.

At this time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace's supreme Dao Ancestor, Xuanhe Dao Ancestor, stared at Shi Ying Dao Ancestor with a very unkind gaze: "Shi Ying, you explain, what's going on?"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor hurriedly explained and told the story of the matter.

But after finishing speaking, Xuanhe Dao Ancestor's eyes became even more unkind.

Subsequently, Xuanhe Dao Ancestor asked the other Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, leading to understanding what had happened.

"Shi Ying, you are also a very potential Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, it is not difficult for you to break through the Supreme Dao Ancestor, this is just a small Void Realm, once you break through to the ranks of the Eightfold Heavenly Supreme Dao Ancestor, you will not be able to enter the Forbidden Void Realm. I don't know what treasures you found in the Forbidden Void Realm, so that you actually betrayed the Heavenly Emperor Palace to monopolize this Forbidden Void Realm. All in all, I'm disappointed!"

Xuanhe Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"Lord Xuanhe, it's really not me!"

Shi Ying Daozu explained again.

However, his explanation was simply useless.

"Let's go, go back to the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, and let the Emperors extract your soul origin memory, and then everything will be known!" Xuanhe Daozu said coldly.

"Don't, Lady Xuanhe!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor is desperate, once the soul origin memory is forcibly extracted, the soul origin will inevitably be seriously damaged, and most of his potential will be exhausted, where will he still have the potential to impact the combat power of the Supreme Dao Ancestor at that time!

However, the Heavenly Emperor Palace didn't believe him!
